ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PROJECT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE AND COMPLIANCE WITH DEMAND FOR PHYSICAL EXAMINATION

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE AND COMPLIANCE WITH DEMAND FOR PHYSICAL EXAMINATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL RESPOND TO AND COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S SECOND DEMAND FOR INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAM. PLAINTIFF CARRIE THOMAS IS ORDERED TO PAY A MONETARY SANCTION OF $500.00 TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP NO LATER THAN MAY 21, 2012. SEE WRITTEN ORDER. JPT ROBERT CANE, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response And Compliance With Demand For Physical Examiniation
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE AND COMPLIANCE WITH DEMAND FOR PHYSICAL EXAMINATION.
No appearances. This motion will be heard at 9:00am on the Discovery Calendar in department 301. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

Defendant Community Housing Partnership'S Motion To Compel Response And Compliance With Demand For Physical Examiniation
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CARRIE THOMAS.
ROSS C. DWYER, ESQ., ERICKSEN ARBUTHNOT, TEL. 510.832.7770, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY Community Housing Partnership.

PLAINTIFF IS deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

Defendant Community Housing Partnership'S Motion To Compel Response And Compliance With Demand For Physical Examination is granted. PLAINTIFF SHALL RESPOND TO AND COMPLY WITH DEFENDANT'S SECOND DEMAND FOR INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAM. PLAINTIFF CARRIE THOMAS IS ORDERED TO PAY A MONETARY SANCTION OF $500.00 TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP NO LATER THAN MAY 21, 2012. SEE WRITTEN ORDER.

jpt robert cane, not reported.
